name: Christian Martorella
why_notable: Created theHarvester — the first tool to aggregate passive OSINT (emails, subdomains, IPs, hostnames) from multiple search engines and public APIs in a single script. Before theHarvester, this meant querying each source manually. Now at v4 with 40+ sources, it remains the canonical OSINT aggregator. Also created metagoofil for metadata extraction from public documents. His work defined what passive recon tooling looks like.
